candidate.description: Compensating actions that semantically undo a previously committed step in a long-running saga when a downstream step fails.

candidates_full.full_description: ACID property guarantees (atomicity, consistency, isolation, durability) provided by traditional RDBMSes; scope is a single database transaction, not cross-service workflows.
Long-running multi-service workflow modeled as a sequence of local transactions, each with a compensating action invoked on downstream failure to undo prior steps.
